title: Fig. 3 in Point of care colourimetric and lateral flow LAMP assay for the detection of Haemonchus contortus in ruminant faecal samples
author: Khangembam, Rojesh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. Validation of the colourimetric LAMP assay by the ITS2 PCR. A: Gel-electrophoresis image of PCR amplicons. Ladder used: 100 bp ladder. B: Corresponding LAMP results. P: Positive control. N: Non-template control. I-X: Farm I-X. DF: Farm DF. GF: Farm GF. Yellow/Orange = Positive/Weak Positive, Pink/Purple = Negative.
